Hello and welcome to my portfolio! I've embarked on an exciting journey from Desktop Support and Service Desk Engineering to becoming a Front-End Developer. I used to solve technical issues and assist users, but now I'm learning to create visually appealing and user-friendly websites. Join me as I showcase my progress and newfound skills in the world of web development.
